concurrency_audit.note: All escape hatches audited and justified with inline documentation. TranscriptionService migrated to CoordinatedFileWriter.

notes: Gate correctly reports FAIL due to 2 skipped UI runtimes. Compilation gate proves code builds for all target platforms. SPM tests cover all layers. Editor performance budget tests enforce keystroke-to-highlight P95 thresholds. All concurrency escape hatches documented.
